title: Plooriod (disambiguation)
content:
'''Plooriod''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Lesser Plooriod Cluster]]''', a [[star cluster]]
*'''[[Plooriod Cluster]]''', a location in [[the galaxy]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Greater Plooriod Cluster]]''', a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] that contained [[Corsin/Legends|Corsin]]
*'''[[Greater Plooriod sector/Legends|Greater Plooriod sector]]''', a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the Expansion Region
*'''[[Greater Plooriod Wardens]]''', a renowned [[Planetary Security Forces|Planetary Security Force]]
*'''[[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]]''', a star cluster in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] that contained [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]
*'''[[Plooriod 940]]''', a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop race]] on Corsin
*'''''[[Plooriod Bodkin]]''''', a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]]
*'''[[Plooriod system/Legends|Plooriod system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Ploo sector/Legends|Ploo sector]]
**'''[[Plooriod III]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Plooriod system
**'''[[Plooriod IV]]''', a planet in the Plooriod system

==See also==
*[[Greater Plooriod (disambiguation)]]
*[[Ploo (disambiguation)]]
